text: Zepto only shows my previous milk and bread orders. I want to discover organic vegetables and new snack brands but they are hidden under sub-menus.
I absolutely love Zepto! Reordering my daily groceries is so fast, takes only two clicks.
It is just a standard delivery app. I search for sugar, buy it, and close the app. Nothing special.
The search function is horrible. I search for local spices and it only shows sponsored big brands instead of showing local artisan brands.
I use Zepto for everything now. The app recommendations for recipes are wonderful and let me try new organic dairy brands.
